sanskrit:
मुक्तसङ्गोऽनहंवादी धृत्युत्साहसमन्वितः।
सिद्ध्यसिद्ध्योर्निर्विकारः कर्ता सात्त्विक उच्यते॥
transliteration:
mukta-saṅgo ’nahaṁ-vādī dhṛty-utsāha-samanvitaḥ |
siddhy-asiddhyor nirvikāraḥ kartā sāttvika ucyate ||
literal_meaning: Detached from association / free from ‘I’-maker / endowed with steadiness & vigor / unchanged by success or failure / such a doer is called sāttvic.
contextual_meaning: Psychological portrait of the optimally-functioning adult: secure attachment style, low neuroticism, high conscientiousness, intrinsic motivation, and antifragile self-esteem.
psychological_state: Flow-state: action without self-referential rumination; dopaminergic engagement detached from outcome.
trigger_scenario: A coder open-sources a project, codes for joy, ships v1.0, receives harsh critique, shrugs, and starts the next sprint unfazed.
anchor_text: Work with steady vigor, untouched by gain or loss.
